findings.issue: Criterion for monorepo structure is listed twice verbatim. Line 33: 'Монорепо структура: backend/, frontend/, infra/, docs/ в корені' and line 35: 'Монорепо структура: backend/, frontend/, infra/, docs/ в корені репозиторію' are identical in substance. Duplicate criteria create ambiguity about which is authoritative and inflate the criterion count.
findings.fix: Remove line 33 entirely. Line 35 (with 'репозиторію') is slightly more precise and should be kept.

findings.issue: Two overlapping criteria for the backend/ Spring Boot setup exist: line 34 ('Spring Boot 4.0.6 + Spring WebFlux + Gradle, package root com.botfunnel') and line 37 ('Spring Boot 4 + Spring WebFlux + Gradle, package root com.botfunnel; Gradle toolchain зафіксований на Java 21'). Line 37 is a superset of line 34 (adds Java 21 toolchain) but uses a less specific version string. Together they are redundant and contradictory on version specificity.
findings.fix: Remove line 34. Merge its unique content (version 4.0.6) into line 37 to produce one criterion: 'backend/ — Spring Boot 4.0.6 + Spring WebFlux + Gradle, package root com.botfunnel; Gradle toolchain зафіксований на Java 21'.

findings.issue: Spring Boot version is specified inconsistently across the two duplicate criteria: line 34 says '4.0.6', line 37 says '4' (without minor version). After merging the duplicates per the fix above, the surviving criterion must pin the exact version '4.0.6' to match the interview tech_decisions value.
findings.fix: After deduplication, ensure the merged criterion uses '4.0.6' consistently.

findings.issue: 17 acceptance criteria listed (threshold for warning: >10). Size L is declared and justified for a full-stack greenfield setup. After removing the two duplicate criteria (findings above), the count drops to 15 — still high but proportionate for L. Flagged per check rules only.
findings.location: Критерії приймання (17 items), frontmatter size: L
findings.fix: After deduplication no further action needed if size L is confirmed.

covered: Spring Boot 4.0.6 + Spring WebFlux + Gradle + Java 21
Frontend: Nuxt 3 + Vue 3 + TypeScript + pnpm
Infra: docker-compose.yml with MongoDB + Redis only (no app containers)
Package root: com.botfunnel
Modules in Epic 01: security (SecurityConfig.java) + common placeholder
No spring-boot-devtools (Spring Boot 4 / Spring Framework 7 compatibility)
GET /health → {status:ok} without MongoDB/Redis connectivity check
.env.example: MONGODB_URI + REDIS_URL only
Gitleaks pre-commit hook included in Epic 01
feature_size: L
Developer flow: clone, .env, docker compose up, backend, frontend, verify
Edge case: port 27017 or 6379 already in use → documented in local-setup.md
Edge case: Windows → warning in docs, WSL2 recommended
One WebFlux integration test for GET /health; no frontend tests at skeleton stage
CI/CD + production deploy + monitoring — OUT OF SCOPE
.nvmrc for Node.js LTS
docs/local-setup.md with step-by-step instructions including port conflict instructions
Gitleaks not installed risk — mitigation documented in local-setup.md
JobRunr Boot 4 compatibility risk — documented in Ризики
Seed script deferred — documented in interview metadata notes
SecurityConfig allows /health without auth
BUILD SUCCESSFUL expected from ./gradlew build

summary: Специфікація суттєво покращена порівняно з першим раундом: нетестовані критерії фронтенду виправлені, ризики мають митигації, секція 'Навіщо' конкретна. Єдина критична проблема — два дублікати в критеріях приймання (рядки 33/35 і 34/37), які необхідно злити. Після виправлення специфікація може бути схвалена.
